# Test Fixture Cheat Sheet

Variable docs go above the table in the real document. Skipped here.

## Cheat Sheet

| Target | Description | CI? | Legacy? | Vars |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `build` | Build provider |  |  | `GO_VER` |
| `ci`<sup>M</sup> | Run all CI checks | ✔️ |  |  |
| `docs` | Documentation checks | ✔️ |  |  |
| `ghost-row` | Row pointing at a target that does not exist |  |  |  |
